## Design / RFC

<!-- Tick the box that applies. Significant architectural changes need an
     accepted RFC before implementation — see docs/rfcs/README.md. -->

- [ ] Implements RFC #### <!-- link the accepted RFC, e.g. docs/rfcs/0007-... -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated (if behaviour or configuration changed)
- [ ] Tests updated or added (if applicable)
- [ ] `breaking-change` label applied if this affects on-wire, `racoon.conf`, `libipsec` API, or CLI compatibility
